name: PCI Password Expiry 90 Days
description: Ensures passwords are changed at least every 90 days (PCI DSS 8.2.4)
query: SELECT id, system_name, max_password_age_days FROM password_policies WHERE cde_scope = true AND (max_password_age_days > 90 OR max_password_age_days IS NULL)
remediation: Configure password expiry to maximum 90 days for all accounts with CDE access.
